{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321213337982B25C49102F9247850"}"},"total":198},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7365217549443777305","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"是我番茄迄今为止看过的格局最大的文，以及最正牌的正道魁首。文很长，作者文笔很棒。虽然有些地方太过臃肿，但搞笑风绝绝子。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714853514,"group_id":"7177311901376842808","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读书破万卷，下笔如有神","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N021mH0FQ2YYMz71Mojg6OYHXy0PZ1Jmq3utipKT+ysi","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3667617433259519","user_name":"昂儒昂岛的何英冲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3667617433259519","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7177311901376842808","book_info":{"abstract":"双女主，群像剧。种田+仙侠+炼丹
灭魔之战后，联盟成立专门组，去记录那些为灭魔而死的英杰。不论其种族、修为，性别，联盟只需让后世记得，这天下太平是那些鲜活的生灵用自己的命所换。
季三简想让这个时代，这天地，记住这些名字。
他们曾经活过。
九百多年前，天廊宗清尘女君逆天而上破开天门成仙，飞升之际，她告诉大陆修士：“吾辈修道，大道不孤。”
每个人修炼之路都不孤单，群山间的风，流过万里的江河，在春夏秋冬生长的草木，都是相伴。
这是一个时代之末，魔道纵横，大陆风云暗涌。
一个不能修炼的女婴出生在一个修真世家。

父亲季书璧说：“我的女儿，不能修炼，也能过好一生。”

于是季书璧和妻子简咸抱着他们的女儿季三简去了不能修炼的凡俗界。

可万万没想到，这孩子是穿越而来的人。
更让季书璧没想到的是，他都逃到凡俗界了，还能被找到！！
季书璧苦苦哀求凰霄：“公主殿下，我不管你们凤鸟族的预言如何，我孩子都好几岁了！”
凤鸟族先知预言公主凰霄和人类男性季书璧缘分匪浅，先知一直想让凰霄和季书璧成亲。
而凰霄找到季书璧只是想给他换个命格：这缘分换到木头傀儡身上都行，总之不能是活人。
而季三简：哇—！姐姐，我可以！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of9d0add16847d0b321da84ea42db9934~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"铁大歌女士","author_id":"","book_id":"7177311901376842808","book_name":"穿越修真界：完了我成炉鼎了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":704,"name":"双女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=704&name=双女主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":476,"name":"双向奔赴","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=476&name=双向奔赴&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7177318437734548025","read_count":"379","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1007454"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"470","tags":"双女主,古代,种田,穿越,异世穿越,双向奔赴,强强,群像,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/75da30a7b57ef93cca5bbb96e7d3119e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779284017&x-signature=t3MCdrKL58if2jjDRnnDeTmEc5A%3D","tomato_book
